title: Lesson 241: (Grammar) - -ness; indicates assertion; come; come now

intro_cards.title: Casual Assertion: さ
intro_cards.body:
さ is a casual sentence-final particle that lightly asserts or softens a statement.

• 大丈夫さ。(It'll be fine.)
• 別にいいさ。(It doesn't matter, really.)
• そんなもんさ。(That's just how it is.)

さ mid-sentence can be a filler ('you know' / 'well'):
• それでさ、彼が来たんだよ。(And so, like, he showed up.)

さ can also be a noun-forming suffix for い-adjectives:
• 大きさ (bigness / size) • 高さ (height)

Context tells these apart.
